hooks.command: input=$(cat); fp=$(printf '%s' "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path" *: *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); case "$fp" in *vignettes*[Rr]md) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A vignette .Rmd was just edited. User-configured workflow: once this batch of vignette edits is complete and BEFORE committing, run devtools::document(), then devtools::install(quick=TRUE, upgrade=FALSE, build_vignettes=FALSE), then knit-verify the edited vignette with rmarkdown::render() (RSTUDIO_PANDOC set), rendering to the STANDARD vignettes/<name>.html - no temporary _check.html; leave the refreshed html in place for the user. One knit per batch of edits - not after every individual edit."}}';; esac
